title: Estado final antes da reuniao — OpenAuth corrigido
architecture: nginx gateway (cookie check) + auth service + 4 OpenCode instances

working.login: Fluxo form POST -> servidor -> 302 redirect. Cookie setado na resposta do POST (nao via fetch).
working.auth: nginx verifica $http_cookie por connect.sid (sem auth_request subrequest).
working.users: 6 usuarios no Supabase com senha P3R3TT0M4RK3T1NG (marcos, fhelipe, lucas, csm1, csm2, csm3).

not-implemented.logout-subdomain: /logout nos subdominios (revertido). User acessa pelo dashboard.

pending-tests: Logout -> tentar acessar de novo (nginx deve barrar)
